settings.label: t:settings_schema.favicon.settings.favicon.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.favicon.settings.favicon.info
Zest Settings

Below is Hammitt's CART LEVEL gift messaging settings. If this is enabled, it will override the gifting drawer gift messaging. This means the gift notes will be at the CART LEVEL, not line level. The gifting drawer will remain active, however the message inputs will be hidden.

settings.label: Enable Cart Level Gift Note
settings.info: Creates cart level gift note in cart drawer and overrides line level gift messaging by turning the input into a 'add ribbon for $5.' field

settings.label: Gift checkbox label (accepts HTML)
settings.default: Sending this as a Gift? Add a gift note here.

settings.label: Gifting drawer trigger button label when cart level gifting is enabled
Enable Rivett Club in cart drawer
Enable Hammitt Gifting Drawer
settings.info: Enables the gifting drawer in the cart, which are LINE LEVEL gifting options. Do not enable both at once, and in fact, we should consider sunsetting the cart level gifting options in favor of line level.

settings.label: Gifting Drawer Message
settings.default: 🎁 Sending as a gift? See our gifting options.

settings.label: Hammitt Gift Wrap Product
settings.info: Select the Hammitt Gift Wrap product to be automatically added to cart (and visually hidden) when hand written note / gift wrap option is selected. NOTE: The gifting drawer will not appear if no product is selected. This is to prevent javascript errors.

settings.label: Gifting Drawer Header Text
settings.default: Complimentary gift boxes are available with most items. Please let us know if you want to add a ribbon and note to it or prefer a dust bag only.

settings.label: Confirmation text
settings.default: Thanks for joining the waitlist! We’ll send you an email when this item comes back in stock.

settings.label: Only a few left threshold
settings.info: Only show the message when the quantity is below this number.

Input comma seperated material / leather types here. These must match the 'material' metafield in the product cusomizer to work. The products that have the leather types will be 1. given a special icon, 2. given a tooltip, and 3. have the 'care' info accordion pulled to the top of the accordion list on the PDPs.

settings.label: Comma separated list of special leathers
Special Care tooltip copy
settings.default: This unique leather requires special care. Don’t worry - we’ll walk you through, step by step!.

settings.label: Default Search Products
settings.info: These products will be shown in the search results when no products match the search query. Only 4 please.

This should NOT be activated if we currently have a multi select going on. Additionally, an automatic discount needs to be set up in the admin to make the gift wrap free if this is activated, as this code does not set the product to be free on its own. It is purely visual.

settings.label: Free Gift Wrap Above Image Text
settings.default: Today Only: Free Gift Wrap With Your $300+ Order

settings.info: It is important to note that if these items are usually full price, an automatic discount needs to be created in the shopify admin in order for these products to actually receive a $0.00 price at checkout.

settings.label: Free multi Gift Select Threshold Price
Free multi Gift Qualifies Message
settings.default: Your order qualifies for a Free Gift. Select below.

settings.label: Free multi Gift Select Success Message
Free Gift Select Product Type Text (progress bar)
settings.info: This text comes after the 'spend $x.xx more to receive...[product type]' in the progress bar.
The following tag will qualify products for the free gift, and it will NO LONGER USE the regular cart total.

settings.label: Qualifying tag
settings.info: Products with this tag will qualify for the free gift when added to cart. A running total of only these products will be used to determine eligibility.
We recommend using the Admin App to configure these settings. [Open App](/admin/apps/swym-relay)

settings.label: Select Position
settings.info: Choose where the wishlist button appears on your product page. Select 'Custom Placement' to manually specify a location using a CSS selector. [Help](https://help.getswym.com/en/articles/13249541-how-to-find-css-selectors-for-custom-button-placement)

settings.label: Custom Placement Selector
settings.info: Enter a CSS selector of the parent element to anchor the button. Only used if Button Position is set to 'Custom' Placement. [Help](https://help.getswym.com/en/articles/13249541-how-to-find-css-selectors-for-custom-button-placement)
We recommend using the Admin App to configure these settings. [Open App](/admin/apps/swym-relay)

settings.label: Add to Wishlist HTML
settings.info: Customize the button's appearance for products not yet saved to the wishlist.

settings.label: Added to Wishlist HTML
settings.info: Customize the button's appearance for products already in the wishlist.

settings.label: Custom Styling (CSS)
settings.info: Modify CSS here to fine-tune the button's design and ensure it matches your theme perfectly.

settings.content: Configure the wishlist button that appears on collection pages. This button allows customers to add products to their wishlist directly from collection listings. [Help](https://help.getswym.com/en/articles/13712073-customizing-the-advanced-wishlist-button-on-collections-pages)
settings.info: We recommend using the Admin App to configure these settings. [Open App](/admin/apps/swym-relay)

settings.label: Enable Quick Save Button
settings.info: Enable Quick Save Button on Collections Pages

settings.label: Show Social Count
settings.info: Display the number of times a product has been wishlisted

settings.label: Button HTML (Before Adding)
settings.info: Custom HTML for the wishlist button before a product is added. Leave empty to use default

settings.label: Button HTML (After Adding)
settings.info: Custom HTML for the wishlist button after a product is added. Leave empty to use default

settings.label: Button CSS
settings.info: CSS styles for the wishlist button. Leave empty to use default styles.

settings.label: Product URL Selector
settings.info: CSS selector to find product links on collection pages. [Help](https://help.getswym.com/en/articles/13712096-finding-selectors-for-advanced-collections-quick-save)

settings.label: Button Container Selector
settings.info: CSS selector for where to attach the wishlist button. [Help](https://help.getswym.com/en/articles/13712096-finding-selectors-for-advanced-collections-quick-save)

settings.content: Configure the wishlist launcher icon that appears in your store header. This icon provides quick access to the wishlist page and can display the count of saved products.
settings.info: We recommend using the Admin App to configure these settings. [Open App](/admin/apps/swym-relay)

settings.label: Enable Header Icon
settings.info: Enable or disable the wishlist launcher icon in your store header

settings.label: Show Wishlist Count
settings.info: Display the total number of products wishlisted by the customer

settings.label: Icon HTML
settings.info: Custom HTML for the wishlist icon. Leave empty to use default

settings.label: Count Bubble HTML
settings.info: Custom HTML for the count bubble that displays the number of wishlisted items

settings.label: Custom CSS
settings.info: CSS styles for the header icon. Leave empty to use default styles.

settings.label: Desktop Placement Selector
settings.info: CSS selector for where to attach the icon on desktop view

settings.label: Mobile Placement Selector
settings.info: CSS selector for where to attach the icon on mobile view
